findings.message: No canonical URL specified
findings.suggestedFix: Add <link rel="canonical" href="…"> to avoid duplicate content

findings.message: No JSON-LD structured data found
findings.suggestedFix: Add Organization, WebSite, and page-specific JSON-LD (Article, FAQPage, etc.)

findings.message: robots.txt does not reference the sitemap
findings.suggestedFix: Add "Sitemap: https://pokerzeno.com/sitemap.xml" to robots.txt

findings.message: robots.txt has no User-agent directive
findings.suggestedFix: Add "User-agent: *" with appropriate Allow/Disallow rules

findings.message: sitemap.xml returns 404
findings.suggestedFix: Create src/app/sitemap.ts (Next.js) to auto-generate sitemap

findings.message: Page has 333 words — consider expanding for better topical depth
findings.suggestedFix: Aim for 600–1200 words on key pages for topical authority

findings.message: No analytics script detected (Cloudflare, Plausible, or GA4)
findings.suggestedFix: Add Cloudflare Web Analytics (free, privacy-first) — add the beacon script to layout

findings.message: Missing og:image — links shared on social will have no preview image
findings.suggestedFix: Add og:image (1200×630px) for rich social sharing previews

findings.message: Missing og:url
findings.suggestedFix: Add <meta property="og:url" content="…page URL…">

findings.message: Missing Strict-Transport-Security header
findings.suggestedFix: Add "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload"

findings.message: Missing clickjacking protection (X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors)
findings.suggestedFix: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or CSP frame-ancestors directive

findings.message: No Permissions-Policy header (optional but best practice)
findings.suggestedFix: Add Permissions-Policy to restrict camera/mic/geolocation access
